mapper.select: SELECT ITEM.SEQ AS ITEM_SEQ, GET_CODE_NAME(ITEM.GROUP_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS GROUP_NAME, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, ITEM.ITEM_NAME, ITEM.REMARK, PARAM.ITEM_SCORE, EVS.EVS_OCC_GROUP_NAME, (SELECT SCORE.EVS_SCORE FROM EVS_ITEM_SCORE SCORE, EVS_AFFIRM AFFIRM WHERE SCORE.AFFIRM_SEQ = AFFIRM.SEQ AND SCORE.ITEM_SEQ = ITEM.SEQ AND AFFIRM.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = EVS.SEQ AND AFFIRM.AFFIRM_LEVEL = 0) AS EVS_SCORE0, (SELECT SCORE.EVS_SCORE FROM EVS_ITEM_SCORE SCORE, EVS_AFFIRM AFFIRM WHERE SCORE.AFFIRM_SEQ = AFFIRM.SEQ AND SCORE.ITEM_SEQ = ITEM.SEQ AND AFFIRM.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = EVS.SEQ AND AFFIRM.AFFIRM_LEVEL = 1) AS EVS_SCORE1, (SELECT SCORE.EVS_SCORE FROM EVS_ITEM_SCORE SCORE, EVS_AFFIRM AFFIRM WHERE SCORE.AFFIRM_SEQ = AFFIRM.SEQ AND SCORE.ITEM_SEQ = ITEM.SEQ AND AFFIRM.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = EVS.SEQ AND AFFIRM.AFFIRM_LEVEL = 2) AS EVS_SCORE2 FROM EVS_OBJECT EVS, EVS_ITEM ITEM, EVS_ITEM_PARAM PARAM WHERE ITEM.RESUME_SEQ = PARAM.RESUME_SEQ AND ITEM.ITEM_CODE = PARAM.ITEM_CODE AND PARAM.RESUME_SEQ = EVS.RESUME_SEQ AND PARAM.EVS_OCC_GROUP = EVS.EVS_OCC_GROUP AND PARAM.EVS_GROUP = EVS.EVS_GROUP AND EVS.RESUME_SEQ = #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PARAM.ACTIVITY <> 2 AND EVS.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(ITEM.SEQ)
mapper.update: MERGE INTO EVS_AFFIRM A USING ( SELECT B1.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, B1.AFFIRM_LEVEL, B1.CALC_POINT, (SELECT GET_GLOBAL_NAME(g.EVS_GRADE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) FROM EVS_GRADE g, EVS_OBJECT o WHERE o.SEQ = B1.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ AND o.RESUME_SEQ = g.RESUME_SEQ AND B1.CALC_POINT BETWEEN g.START_SCORE AND g.END_SCORE AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CALC_GRADE FROM ( SELECT #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, 0 AS AFFIRM_LEVEL, ROUND( NVL(( SELECT SUM(NVL(TO_NUMBER(SCORE.EVS_SCORE), 0) * NVL(TO_NUMBER(PARAM.ITEM_SCORE), 0)) / NULLIF(MAX(MAX_Q.MAX_SCORE), 0) FROM EVS_ITEM_SCORE SCORE, EVS_AFFIRM AFFIRM, EVS_ITEM ITEM, EVS_OBJECT OBJ, EVS_ITEM_PARAM PARAM, (SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(P.EVS_SCORE)) AS MAX_SCORE FROM EVS_PARAM P, EVS_OBJECT O2 WHERE O2.SEQ = #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND P.RESUME_SEQ = O2.RESUME_SEQ AND P.PARAM_TYPE = 'ITEM') MAX_Q WHERE SCORE.AFFIRM_SEQ = AFFIRM.SEQ AND SCORE.ITEM_SEQ = ITEM.SEQ AND AFFIRM.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = OBJ.SEQ AND ITEM.ITEM_CODE = PARAM.ITEM_CODE AND ITEM.RESUME_SEQ = PARAM.RESUME_SEQ AND PARAM.EVS_OCC_GROUP = OBJ.EVS_OCC_GROUP AND PARAM.EVS_GROUP = OBJ.EVS_GROUP AND AFFIRM.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFFIRM.AFFIRM_LEVEL = 0 ), 0), 2) AS CALC_POINT FROM DUAL ) B1 ) B ON (A.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = B.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ AND A.AFFIRM_LEVEL = B.AFFIRM_LEVEL) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.AFFIRM_CONTENT = #{affirmContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.EVS_POINT = B.CALC_POINT, A.EVS_GRADE = B.CALC_GRADE, A.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SEQ, EVS_OBJECT_SEQ, AFFIRM_LEVEL, AFFIRM_CONTENT, EVS_POINT, EVS_GRADE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE) VALUES (EVS_PARAM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{affirmContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, B.CALC_POINT, B.CALC_GRADE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)

MERGE INTO EVS_ITEM_SCORE SCORE USING ( SELECT AFFIRM.SEQ AS AFFIRM_SEQ FROM EVS_AFFIRM AFFIRM WHERE AFFIRM.EVS_OBJECT_SEQ = #{evsObjectSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AFFIRM.AFFIRM_LEVEL = 0 AND ROWNUM = 1 ) A ON (SCORE.AFFIRM_SEQ = A.AFFIRM_SEQ AND SCORE.ITEM_SEQ = #{itemSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SCORE.EVS_SCORE = #{evsScore0, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCORE.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCORE.UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCORE.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, AFFIRM_SEQ, ITEM_SEQ, EVS_SCORE, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP) VALUES (EVS_PARAM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A.AFFIRM_SEQ, #{itemSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsScore0, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
